steps.title: Surveys — built once, run two ways
steps.description: AhaSlides Surveys collect multi-question feedback from your audience. Build a survey once — then share a standalone link, or drop it live into your presentation. Let's see how. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Open Surveys
steps.description: Click Surveys in the left sidebar to open the survey builder — it lives separately from your presentations.

steps.title: The Surveys dashboard
steps.description: Here are all your surveys — you can start from AI, a template, or from scratch. Start from scratch to create a fresh survey, or open an existing one. Let's open our Post-Session Feedback survey.

steps.title: Build your survey questions
steps.description: Inside the editor, mix question types on the same page — Multiple choice, Rating scale, Long answer, Matrix. Each question auto-saves as you type. Add as many pages as you need for longer surveys.

steps.title: Publish — then share
steps.description: When your questions are ready, click Publish to go live. The Share page opens automatically.

steps.title: Mode 1 — share a link or QR code
steps.description: The Share page gives you a respondent link and a QR code, ready to send anywhere. Copy the link and paste it into email or Slack. Print the QR code on a poster. Participants open it on any device — no account needed.

steps.title: QR code — instant access in any room
steps.description: The QR code is right there alongside your link. Download it as a PNG, add it to a slide or handout, and your audience scans it to open the survey instantly on their phones.

steps.title: Mode 2 — add the Survey to your presentation
steps.description: For live sessions, head back to Presentations, add a new slide, and choose the Survey type. Link it to your published survey. When you reach that slide while presenting, the survey appears live on every participant's device — all questions at once.

steps.title: Audience sees all questions at once
steps.description: When the presenter reaches the Survey slide, the full survey appears on every participant's phone — all questions on one page, scroll to answer, and submit. You collect structured feedback without leaving your session.
